title: Benjamin Peirce
body: Benjamin Peirce (; April 4, 1809 – October 6, 1880) was an American mathematician who taught at Harvard University for approximately 50 years. He made contributions to celestial mechanics, statistics, number theory, algebra, and the philosophy of mathematics.
categories: American fellows of the Royal Society
Foreign members of the Royal Society
Harvard University Department of Philosophy faculty
Members of the American Philosophical Society
Members of the United States National Academy of Sciences
